name: Critical rule — reconfigure never overwrites user-edited templates or existing wiki-log
query: I ran wiki-configure a month ago and I've since edited _System/Templates/Session Log.md to match my team's format. I also have a populated _System/wiki-log.md. Re-run the configure flow to update the folder mapping without clobbering those.
expected_behavior: Detect the existing configuration (reconfigure flow, not first-time)
Diff the existing wiki-schema.md Vault Configuration section against the proposed changes
Ask the user to confirm before writing the new schema
Never re-copy Templates/* files if they already exist — only seed missing ones
Report 'No changes — configuration already matches.' and exit if nothing differs
success_criteria: Flow detects this is a reconfigure (not first-time)
Presents a diff of the schema changes before writing
Explicitly skips overwriting existing Templates/Session Log.md
Requires user confirmation before applying changes
